    dashboard() - Method in class com.gcu.inventoryapp.controller.HomeController

    Deletes a customer by ID.
    deleteCustomer(Long) - Method in interface com.gcu.inventoryapp.service.CustomerService
     
    deleteCustomer(Long) - Method in class com.gcu.inventoryapp.service.impl.CustomerServiceImpl
    Deletes a customer by their ID.
    deleteProduct(Long) - Method in class com.gcu.inventoryapp.controller.ProductController
    Deletes a product by ID if it is not associated with inventory or orders.
    deleteProduct(Long) - Method in class com.gcu.inventoryapp.service.impl.ProductServiceImpl
    Deletes a product by ID if it is not associated with inventory or order items.
